title: Quick Right-Click
description: ✋ Adds a portable functionality to certain items, which allows for quick access without placement. Works with beds, crafting tables, ender chests and shulker boxes among others.
body:
Quick Right-Click is a QoL mod which enables players to quickly access many functional blocks without having to place them down. Just right-click the item in the air, without targeting a block. Quickly sleep in a bed, access your ender chest or open shulker boxes. Some will be opened directly, others placed down automatically. See the example GIFs below for a better idea of how it works.

Works for:
Beds, Cartography Tables, Crafting Tables, Ender Chests, Grindstones, Shulker Boxes, Smithing Tables and Stonecutters.








   All available config options:

Show Spoiler

enableQuickBeds  default true
If right-clicking beds in the air should enable the quick feature.

enableQuickCartographyTables  default true
If right-clicking cartography tables in the air should enable the quick feature.

enableQuickCraftingTables  default true
If right-clicking crafting tables in the air should enable the quick feature.

enableQuickEnderChests  default true
If right-clicking ender chests in the air should enable the quick feature.

enableQuickGrindstones  default true
If right-clicking grindstones in the air should enable the quick feature.

enableQuickShulkerBoxes  default true
If right-clicking shulker boxes in the air should enable the quick feature.

enableQuickSmithingTables  default true
If right-clicking smithing tables in the air should enable the quick feature.

enableQuickStonecutters  default true
If right-clicking stonecutters in the air should enable the quick feature.




Quickly sleep in a bed. It'll be placed down and picked up automatically once done sleeping.

Show Spoiler

 


Quickly access your ender chest, without the need for silk touch to pick it back up.

Show Spoiler

 


Open Shulker Boxes quickly, access its contents and be on your way.

Show Spoiler

 


Craft items quickly without leaving crafting tables everywhere you go.

Show Spoiler

 


Also works for cartography tables, and the other village profession blocks.

Show Spoiler




You may freely use this mod in any modpack, as long as the download remains hosted within the CurseForge or Modrinth ecosystem.

Serilum.com contains an overview and more information on all mods available.

For issues, ideas, suggestions or anything else there is the Github repo. Thanks!
